query:
SELECT id, name, location, priority, sector, LEFT(overview, 300) AS overview_snippet, equipmentSignals
FROM projects
WHERE (
  name LIKE '%paint%' OR name LIKE '%coating%' OR name LIKE '%corrosion%'
  OR name LIKE '%remediation%' OR name LIKE '%refurbish%'
  OR overview LIKE '%painting%' OR overview LIKE '%coatings%'
  OR overview LIKE '%corrosion protection%'
)
AND id != '1110004'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT id, name, location, priority, sector, LEFT(overview, 300) AS overview_snippet, equipmentSignals
FROM projects
WHERE (
  name LIKE '%paint%' OR name LIKE '%coating%' OR name LIKE '%corrosion%'
  OR name LIKE '%remediation%' OR name LIKE '%refurbish%'
  OR overview LIKE '%painting%' OR overview LIKE '%coatings%'
  OR overview LIKE '%corrosion protection%'
)
AND id != '1110004'
LIMIT 10;

rows.name: RAAF Base Williamtown PFAS Remediation
rows.overview_snippet: Extensive environmental remediation efforts to address PFAS contamination at and around RAAF Base Williamtown. Involves soil and water treatment, containment, and monitoring.
rows.equipmentSignals: ["Water treatment plants", "Soil remediation equipment", "Environmental monitoring systems", "Containment barriers", "Specialized waste management"]

rows.name: Adelaide Desalination Plant Refurbishment
rows.overview_snippet: Ongoing refurbishment and replacement of critical components at the Adelaide Desalination Plant to ensure its operational longevity and efficiency.

rows.name: Manton Dam Refurbishment
rows.overview_snippet: The $189 million refurbishment of Manton Dam, a historic landmark, has strengthened Darwin’s water supply system. Modern pump technology was central to the project.

rows.name: Defence Air Base Building Refurbishment, WA
rows.overview_snippet: Procurement has commenced for refurbishment works at a Defence air base in WA, signalling the project’s progression to the market.

rows.name: Lismore Pump Station Refurbishments
rows.overview_snippet: The NSW Government is detailing pump station refurbishments in Lismore to guard against future floods, including the Magellan Street pump station.

rows.name: Bunbury Storm Surge Barrier: Asset Condition, Maintenance and Refurbishment Review
rows.overview_snippet: This tender seeks a review of the Bunbury Storm Surge Barrier's asset condition, maintenance, and refurbishment needs. While the primary focus is on engineering review, any subsequent maintenance or refurbishment works could potentially require portable air for various tasks like cleaning, operating

rows.name: Pulse Energised Fence - Hakea Prison
rows.overview_snippet: This tender is for the installation of a pulse energised fence at Hakea Prison. While the primary focus is security fencing, construction and maintenance activities for such infrastructure projects can sometimes require portable compressed air for tools like drills, grinders, or painting equipment.

rows.name: South Hedland Office Refurbishments
rows.overview_snippet: This tender is for proposed office refurbishments at 22 Hamilton Road, South Hedland for the Department of Communities. While primarily an office fit-out, refurbishment projects can sometimes require portable air compressors for demolition tools, painting, or general construction tasks, and potentia

rows.name: Armadale Health Service (AHS) Yorgum Courtyard Refurbishment
rows.overview_snippet: This tender is for the refurbishment of the Yorgum Courtyard at Armadale Health Service. As a building and facility construction project, there is a low but plausible chance that portable compressed air tools might be used for demolition, construction, or landscaping tasks.

rows.name: WA Police HQ Office Refurbishment
rows.overview_snippet: This tender is for the refurbishment of office levels 1 and 3 at the WA Police Headquarters. This project involves building and facility construction and maintenance services. Atlas Copco Portable Air equipment could potentially be relevant for demolition, renovation, or general construction tasks r
